displayTitle: Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 6
synopsis: Collects Star Wars: Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse (2011) #1-5; Star Wars: Agent of the Empire – Hard Targets (2012) #1-5; Star Wars: The Force Unleashed (2008) GN; Star Wars: The Force Unleashed II (2010) GN; material from Star Wars Tales (1999) #11, 15; A Decade of Dark Horse (1996) 2.
title: Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: The Empire Vol. 6
